---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}


url <- "https://www.tidetime.org/africa/tanzania/zanzibar-calendar.htm"

page <- read_html(url)

# get all tables as tibbles
tables <- page %>%
  html_nodes("table") %>%
  map(~ html_table(.x, fill = TRUE)) %>%
  map(~ as_tibble(.x, .name_repair = "unique"))

# quick summary to inspect (you can run this to choose the correct table)
table_summaries <- map_chr(tables, ~ paste(names(.x), collapse = " | "))
# If you want to see them interactively: table_summaries

# heuristics: prefer table with a "Date" like column; otherwise pick the largest table
pick_idx <- which(map_lgl(tables, ~ any(str_detect(names(.x), regex("date|day", ignore_case = TRUE)))))
if (length(pick_idx) == 0) {
  pick_idx <- which.max(map_int(tables, ncol) * map_int(tables, nrow))
} else {
  pick_idx <- pick_idx[1]
}

tides_raw <- tables[[pick_idx]] %>%
  rename_with(~ str_trim(.x)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(. == "" | . == "–" , NA_character_, as.character(.))))

# a generic tidy attempt: pivot measured columns into rows and extract time and height
id_cols <- names(tides_raw)[1:1]   # assume first column is the date; adjust if needed
measure_cols <- setdiff(names(tides_raw), id_cols)

tides_tidy <- tides_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(measure_cols), names_to = "event", values_to = "raw") %>%
  filter(!is.na(raw)) %>%
  mutate(
    # try to extract a time like 07:12 or 7:12 and an optional am/pm
    time_str = str_extract(raw, "\\b\\d{1,2}:\\d{2}\\s*(?:am|pm|AM|PM)?\\b"),
    # try to extract a numeric height (e.g. "1.2 m" or "0.9")
    height_m = str_extract(raw, "\\d+\\.?\\d*(?=\\s*m|$)") %>% as.numeric(),
    date = parse_date_time(!!sym(id_cols[1]), orders = c("dmy", "ymd", "d b Y"), truncated = 3)
  ) %>%
  select(date, event, time_str, height_m, raw)


```

```{r}
# return the tidy object
tides_tidy
```
